titleStmt.title: SII 26.415: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 415. (A.R. No. 394 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records the purchase of the village of Vilvalam as kāṇi by the Kaikkōḷars including Kaḍalaḍaittāṉ of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēśam in Kuṟukkaikkūṟṟam in Irājarāja-vaḷanāḍu from the sabhai of the same place, and its donation as dēvadāna to the temple of the god Tiruppulippagava-nāyaṉār of the same place. It is stated that from the month of Kārttigai of the year quoted (i.e. 10th), all the levies and incomes from the entire village such as kaḍamai, antarāyam, kaṟpūra-vilai, poṉ-vari, vini-yōgam, upādi, pañchupili, sandhivigrahappēṟu, iḍaiyar-vari, iṉa-vari, ērimīṉ-pāṭṭam, vāśal-vari, talaiyoppu, taṟi-iṟai, chekk-irai, taṭṭoli, taṭṭār-pāṭṭam and other incomes, should be enjoyed by the purchasers. They in their turn should annually pay paddy at the rate of 12 kalam per one mā of nañjai land and 5 kalam per one mā of land with crops of Sittiraikār pāddy irrigating by means of well-water; and 4 poṉ for the puṉśey, puṟavaḍai and nattam (house-site) lands to the temple.
Two signatories named Śundarapāṇḍya-Kāliṅgarāyaṉ and Neṭṭūruḍaiyāṉ figure.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koneṟiṉmaikoṇṭāṉ tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭitevaṟku yāṇṭu 10vatu Irājarājava nāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟa
ttu brahmatecam ciṟṟiṅkūr Uṭaiyār tiruppulippakavanāyaṉār koyiṟ tāṉattārkkut taṅkaḷ koyiṟ
kaikkoḷaril kaṭalaṭaittāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Ivvūr sabhaiyār pakkal kāṇiyākak koṇṭu Innā
yaṉārkkut tevatāṉamāka Iṭṭa vilvalattukku cātaṉappaṭi nāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey pu
ṉcey puṟavaṭai Uḷḷa nattam Uṭpaṭṭa samastaprātikaḷukkum varum kaṭamai Antarāyam kaṟpūravilai
poṉvari viṉiyokam Upāti Upāti pañcupili sandhivigrahappeṟu Iṭaiyarvari Iṉavari Erimiṉ
pāṭṭam vācalvari talaiyoppu taṟiiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārpāṭṭam U
ṭpaṭa maṟṟum varum Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum pattāvatu kāttikai mātam mutal variyiṟ
kaḻittu Ikkaṭalaṭaittāṉ muḷḷiṭṭār kāṇipeṟ tevatāṉak kaṭamaikku Iv
vūr payirpārttu payirkoṇṭa naṉcey Inaiyaṭinilam Orumāvukku māttāl paṉ
ṉiru kalamāka vanta nellum cittiraikkār Ettam Iṟaittu payiṟceyta nilattu
kku māttāl Aṟukalanelkoḷḷavum puṉcey puṟavaṭai Uḷḷa nattam Uṭpaṭṭa
Aṉaittu vaṟkattukkum Āṇṭoṉṟukku nālu poṉṉum Iṟuttu Aṉupavippār
kaḷākac coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākakkoṇṭu candrādityavat ce
lvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittu Ivvūr nāṉkellaiyilum tiru
ccūla stāpaṉamum paṇṇikkoḷka tulyam cuntarapāṇṭiya kāliṅka
rāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu śrīmāhe
śvara rakṣaiḥ §
Digital edition of SII 26.415 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
